---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or goal

What problem does this solve, or what would you like to see? (e.g. “I want to compare my local metrics with real-user data.”)

## Proposed solution

A clear description of the feature or change you’d like.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches or extensions you’ve thought about.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to docs, or examples from other tools (e.g. Page Speed Insights, DevTools) that are related.
